seo.title: Contact · Rosso Consulting
seo.description: Contact Rosso Consulting — Marco Rosso, founder and principal.

hero.headline: Let's talk
hero.sub: Initial conversations are unbilled and last about thirty minutes. Bring the question. The shape of the engagement comes later.

cards.label: Email
cards.description: The fastest route. Inbox checked daily, responses typically within twenty-four hours on weekdays.

cards.label: LinkedIn
cards.description: For founders, peers, and industry contacts. Direct messages with context are answered; cold pitches generally are not.

items.label: Domicile
items.p: The studio is registered in Switzerland under Swiss commercial law. Invoicing is in CHF; cross-border rates available for EU and non-EU engagements.

items.label: Languages
items.p: Engagements run in any of three working languages. Italian and English are primary; Spanish is full professional fluency from prior commercial roles in Madrid and Barcelona.

items.label: Coverage
items.p: Most engagements run across DACH, Iberia, Italy, France, and the UK. Selective work outside EMEA where there is clear sectoral or relational fit.

whatToInclude.title: What to include
whatToInclude.lead: A useful initial note covers three things. The note itself can be short — two paragraphs is usually enough.

items.p: A short description of the problem or opportunity, in plain language. Specificity helps; certainty is not required.
Where you sit — operator, founder, investor, peer — and the rough scale or stage you are operating at. Two or three lines.
Whether this is a fast-moving situation or an exploratory conversation. Both are welcome; response cadence differs.

whatToInclude.referencesNote: References from prior clients and advisory boards are available on request after an initial conversation has established mutual fit.
